text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 12 

ASC_EVENTS 

LABEL: Ambulatory Surgery Center Events 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the count of events in the Part B ambulatory surgery center (ASC) setting for a given year. 
An event is defined as each line item that contains an ASC service. 

ASC claim lines are a subset of the claims in the Part B carrier data file. The ASC claim lines are identified 
by the claim lines
